checks.description: Artifact location exists and is readable
package.json exists and is valid JSON
Critical directories from build plan exist
All planned files exist on disk
No hardcoded secrets or API keys
No eval(), Function(), or dangerous dynamic code
No console.log of sensitive data patterns
Individual file size within budget (warn >500, high >1000 lines)
No synchronous file I/O in server files

checks.detail: Startup: npm run dev, entry: src/main.tsx

checks.description: Responsive patterns present in UI files
Empty state handling in list/data components

checks.detail: Color contrast or accessibility-aware theming detected

findings.title: Missing 28 directories from build plan
findings.description: Directories expected by build plan are missing: src/api, src/components/features/endless_survival_gameplay_with_increasing_enemy_difficulty, src/components/features/pointbased_upgrade_system_for_fighter_abilities_and_attributes, src/components/features/dynamic_urban_environments_with_interactive_elements, src/components/features/leaderboard_to_compare_scores_with_other_players_globally, src/components/features/customizable_fighters_with_unique_skins_or_abilities, src/components/features/achievement_system_for_unlockable_rewards, src/components/features/ingame_tutorials_and_guidance_for_new_players, src/components/features/offline_mode_with_local_score_tracking, tests/integration
findings.probable_cause: Build process did not create all planned directory structures
findings.remediation: Ensure all planned directories are created during the build process

findings.title: 334 planned files missing (17%)
findings.description: The following planned files were not generated: src/server/dto/endless_survival_gameplay_with_increasing_enemy_difficulty.request.ts, src/server/dto/endless_survival_gameplay_with_increasing_enemy_difficulty.response.ts, src/server/dto/pointbased_upgrade_system_for_fighter_abilities_and_attributes.request.ts, src/server/dto/pointbased_upgrade_system_for_fighter_abilities_and_attributes.response.ts, src/server/dto/dynamic_urban_environments_with_interactive_elements.request.ts, src/server/dto/dynamic_urban_environments_with_interactive_elements.response.ts, src/server/dto/leaderboard_to_compare_scores_with_other_players_globally.request.ts, src/server/dto/leaderboard_to_compare_scores_with_other_players_globally.response.ts, src/server/dto/customizable_fighters_with_unique_skins_or_abilities.request.ts, src/server/dto/customizable_fighters_with_unique_skins_or_abilities.response.ts and 324 more
findings.probable_cause: Build generation did not produce all files specified in the build plan
findings.remediation: Re-run generation for the missing files or update the build plan

findings.title: 12 files have excessive TODOs (>10 each)
findings.description: Files with very high placeholder density: src/server/controllers/dynamic-urban-environments-with-interactive-elements.controller.ts, src/server/repositories/(repeat-per-model.).repository.ts, src/server/routes/data.ts, src/server/routes/endless-survival-gameplay-with-increasing-enemy-difficulty.ts, src/server/routes/request.ts
findings.probable_cause: Generated code contains too many TODO/FIXME markers indicating incomplete implementation
findings.remediation: Replace TODO markers with actual implementation code

findings.title: 41 files have elevated TODOs (>3 each)
findings.description: Files with moderate placeholder density: src/server/controllers/in-game-tutorials-and-guidance-for-new-players.controller.ts, src/server/events/moderate-leaderboard-entries-completed.ts, src/server/events/start-a-new-game-completed.ts, src/server/mappers/achievement_system_for_unlockable_rewards.mapper.ts, src/server/mappers/scenarios.mapper.ts
findings.probable_cause: Generated code contains several TODO/FIXME markers
findings.remediation: Review and resolve TODO markers before deployment

findings.title: 59 files have broken import paths
findings.description: Files importing non-existent local modules: src/components/features/CustomizableFighterswithUniqueSkinsorAbilities/index.tsx, src/components/features/In-gameTutorialsandGuidanceforNewPlayers/index.tsx, src/components/features/LeaderboardtoCompareScoreswithOtherPlayersGlobally/index.tsx, src/pages/Profile.tsx, src/server/app.ts
findings.probable_cause: Generated files reference modules that were not created or have incorrect paths
findings.remediation: Fix import paths to reference existing modules or generate the missing modules

findings.title: Hardcoded secrets detected in 1 files
findings.description: Potential secrets/API keys found in: src/lib/utils/constants.ts
findings.probable_cause: Generated code contains hardcoded credentials instead of environment variable references
findings.remediation: Replace hardcoded secrets with environment variable references (process.env.*)

findings.title: Sensitive data logging in 3 files
findings.description: Files that may log sensitive information: src/server/events/submit-high-score-to-leaderboard-completed.ts, src/server/migrations/keys.migration.ts, src/server/seeds/keys.seed.ts
findings.probable_cause: Generated code logs potentially sensitive data (passwords, tokens, keys) to console
findings.remediation: Remove or redact sensitive data from console.log statements

findings.title: 2 barrel files with excessive re-exports
findings.description: Index files with >20 re-exports that may cause bundle bloat: src/lib/store/index.ts, src/lib/validators/index.ts
findings.probable_cause: Barrel exports import and re-export many modules which can prevent tree-shaking
findings.remediation: Use direct imports instead of barrel re-exports, or split into smaller barrel files

findings.title: 8 files exceed 500 lines
findings.probable_cause: Generated files are larger than recommended which may impact maintainability
findings.remediation: Consider splitting files >500 lines into smaller, focused modules

findings.title: 4 form files missing accessible labels
findings.description: Form controls without htmlFor, aria-label, or aria-labelledby in 4 files
findings.probable_cause: Generated form components lack accessible labels for screen readers
findings.remediation: Add htmlFor, aria-label, or aria-labelledby to all form controls

hard_stop_failures: Critical finding: Hardcoded secrets detected in 1 files

tests.name: Artifact Location Exists
tests.description: Verify the build artifact directory exists and is readable.

tests.name: Required Files Present
tests.description: Verify critical build files exist (package.json, lock files, configuration files).

tests.name: Environment Contract Exists
tests.description: Ensure environment variable requirements are documented (.env.example, env.contract.json, .env.schema.json).

tests.name: Startup Script Declared
tests.description: Verify the system has a startup path (npm start, npm run dev, npm run build).

tests.name: Primary Workflow Executes
tests.description: Verify the main user workflow completes successfully (Create → Save → View).

tests.name: API Contract Valid
tests.description: Ensure API responses match expected schema.

tests.name: CRUD Operations Work
tests.description: Verify create, read, update, delete operations.

tests.name: Error Handling Path Works
tests.description: Verify the system handles invalid input properly.

tests.name: Secrets Exposure Scan
tests.description: Detect exposed secrets (API keys, credentials in code).

tests.name: Unsafe Config Exposure
tests.description: Detect exposed debug or admin surfaces.

tests.name: Route Load Time
tests.description: Measure page or API load latency.

tests.name: Repeated Action Stability
tests.description: Ensure repeated operations remain stable (repeat action 100 times).

tests.name: Environment Variables Declared
tests.description: Verify required environment variables are defined.

tests.name: Health Endpoint Exists
tests.description: Ensure readiness or health endpoint exists.
